query: Can you generate a one-week travel itinerary for a group of 3 from Newark to Florida covering 3 cities from March 18th to March 24th, 2022? Our budget is $10,400. We require accommodations that are entire rooms. Although we won't be self-driving, we'd prefer locations that allow parties.

plan.transportation: F3908265, from Newark to Miami, 2 hours 12 mins
plan.accommodation: Charming 1BD Heart of Financial Dist, Miami, $386

plan.attraction: Jungle Island;Pérez Art Museum Miami;Wynwood Walls;
plan.accommodation: Charming 1BD Heart of Financial Dist, Miami, $386

plan.attraction: Bayfront Park;Maurice A. Ferré Park;Bayside Marketplace;
plan.accommodation: Charming 1BD Heart of Financial Dist, Miami, $386

plan.transportation: taxi, from Miami to Punta Gorda, 2 hours 41 mins
plan.accommodation: QUIET 1BR apartment CLOSE to EVERYTHING, Punta Gorda, $498

plan.attraction: Laishley Park;Ponce De Leon Park;Peace River Wildlife Center;
plan.accommodation: QUIET 1BR apartment CLOSE to EVERYTHING, Punta Gorda, $498

plan.attraction: Punta Gorda Nature Park;Charlotte Harbor Preserve State Park;Charlotte Harbor Environmental Center;
plan.dinner: Hide Out The Street Cafe, Punta Gorda, $92
